summary: World-Class Data Flywheel Features Testing Complete - All 4 requested features verified working: Celebrations Calendar in Admin Panel, Celebrations Calendar Stats, Breed Product Recommendations on Checkout, and Festival Celebration Question in Pet Soul Questionnaire.

details: Celebrations tab visible in Admin Panel navigation
Pet Celebrations Calendar header with description 'Upcoming birthdays, gotcha days, and festival celebrations'
Search bar for filtering by pet name, breed, or owner
Time range selector (Next 30/60/90 days, 6 months, Full year)
Festivals On/Off toggle button
Refresh button to reload data
Events grouped by 'This Month' section
Each event shows: Pet name, breed badge, event type badge (Birthday/Gotcha Day), date, days until, owner name
WhatsApp contact button (green) for each event with phone number
Email contact button (blue) for each event with email address
events_found: Mojo - Birthday - Thu, 29 Jan (In 9 days) - Owner: Dipali Sikand
Mojo - Gotcha Day - Sat, 31 Jan (In 11 days) - Owner: Dipali Sikand
Lola - Birthday - Turning 2 - Sat, 31 Jan (In 11 days) - Owner: Aditya Sikand

details: Birthdays stat card: Shows count 2 (pink gradient)
Gotcha Days stat card: Shows count 1 (blue gradient)
Festivals stat card: Shows count 0 (orange gradient)
This Week stat card: Shows count 0 (purple gradient)
All stats have appropriate icons (Cake, Home, PartyPopper, Gift)
Breed input field with autocomplete on Checkout page
When typing 'Labrador', shows 'Suggested breeds' dropdown with 'Labrador Retriever'
After entering breed, 'Perfect for Labrador! 🐕' section appears
Shows 'Products specially made for this breed' subtitle
Displays breed-specific products: Labrador (₹950), Labrador Feeding Mat (₹350), Labrador Breed Cake (₹950)
'View all products for Labrador' link at bottom
Products show image, name, and price
Celebration Calendar step visible in Pet Soul questionnaire (Step 5 of 6)
Header: 'Celebration Calendar 🎉'
Subtitle: 'Life is short - celebrate often! Pick occasions to get reminders & treat suggestions'
Festival options available: Birthday, Gotcha Day, Diwali Pawty, Christmas, Valentine's Day, Easter, Holi, Halloween, Summer Celebration, New Year
'+ Add Custom Celebration Date' option for custom celebrations
Note about personalized reminders: '7 days before and 1 day before each celebration, with treat recommendations'

pet_soul_questions_api.question_text: Which celebrations would you like to celebrate with your pet?

critical_code_review_comments: CelebrationsCalendar.jsx: Well-implemented with stats cards, event grouping (This Week, This Month, Coming Up), search/filter, and contact actions
pet_soul_routes.py: celebrations-calendar API correctly fetches birthdays, gotcha days, and festival celebrations with owner contact info
Checkout.jsx: Breed product recommendations fetch from /api/pet-soul/breed-products/{breed} and display in a clean card layout
Pet Soul questionnaire includes celebration_preferences question in Long Horizon folder with 11 festival options
seed_data_creation: Used existing pet data: Mojo (birthday Jan 29, gotcha day Jan 31), Lola (birthday Jan 31)
context_for_next_testing_agent: World-Class Data Flywheel features fully tested and working. Celebrations Calendar in Admin Panel shows upcoming birthdays, gotcha days with WhatsApp/Email contact buttons. Stats show counts for Birthdays (2), Gotcha Days (1), Festivals (0), This Week (0). Breed product recommendations on Checkout work when entering a breed name (e.g., 'Labrador' shows 3 products). Festival celebration question in Pet Soul questionnaire (Step 5) shows 10 celebration options including Diwali, Holi, Christmas, etc. All APIs returning correct data.
